summary: A clip of a bearded man in a dark suit and light blue tie speaking from behind a lectern bearing the seal of the Vice President of the United States, in front of a very large American flag backdrop. A 'PBS NEWS' logo appears in the lower left corner. The framing is steady across the sampled frames as he speaks.

script.scene: A man at a lectern with the Vice President's seal speaks in front of a large American flag; 'PBS NEWS' logo at lower left.
The same speaker continues, gesturing slightly while addressing an audience off-camera.
Continued podium remarks in the same setting.

notable_text: PBS NEWS; VICE PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES
